message:
viz: add dataset tools (validate, unit tests, E2E) + perf cache integration

- tools/validate-dataset.mjs: dataset validation (patch apply, metadata, snapshot check)
- tools/test-dataset.mjs: 44 unit tests for patch apply, countDiffLines, hash, JSON serialization
- tools/e2e-dataset.mjs: lightweight E2E script
- e2e/frankensqlite.spec.ts: Playwright E2E test additions
- Cache layer integration: WORKER_RESULT_CACHE in workerRequest with cache-hit/miss tracking
- Warmup progress bar, cancellation button, PERF_BUDGET timing logger
- Performance E2E tests (window.__runPerfE2ETests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
